title: Minecraft: Create Together [Legacy pack]
description: Small Create mod themed modpack with Essential mod to play with friends.
body:
![M:CT 0.3 beta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfd52495657f16b5d89d75cc55d2fbc90cab1b2c.png)

### Minecraft: Create Together is a Create mod themed modpack made to play with friends on multiplayer via Essential mod.


### For Issues & Suggestions Form [Click here.](https://forms.gle/JGrbwr8cg477Q9Tx5)


## The Legacy pack - what that means is that I won't update it anymore (I still haven't for over a year but you get the point)


_Updated 03/05/2024_

### Mod list:
> Mod list contains mods that are in the latest version of modpack.
